# LF Surveillance Platform

> Real-time Lassa Fever surveillance and awareness platform for Nigeria (2020–2026).
> Developed by Adam Ibn.

## What this site is

LF Surveillance Platform is a public health intelligence website tracking Lassa fever outbreaks
across Nigeria. It provides epidemiological data, interactive visualizations, outbreak predictions,
prevention guidelines, and a live symptom reporting system.

## Key sections

- **Hero** — Live surveillance status badge, platform overview, quick statistics
- **Overview** (`#overview`) — Disease background: causes, symptoms, transmission, prevention, treatment
- **Live Dashboard** (`#dashboard`) — Real-time confirmed cases, deaths, recoveries, CFR; Supabase Realtime live ticker
- **Nigeria Map** (`#map`) — Interactive SVG heatmap of 37 states; click-to-drill state panels; 4-tier risk coloring
- **Epidemiological Analysis** (`#analysis`) — Recharts: yearly trends, seasonal patterns, regional comparisons, CFR analysis
- **AI Forecast** (`#prediction`) — Machine learning predictive models (Random Forest, SMOTE, ALO); 6-month outbreak risk predictions
- **Global Monitoring** (`#global`) — West Africa country comparison; active WHO/NCDC public health alerts
- **Response** (`#response`) — Government interventions, rapid response teams, surveillance systems
- **Prevention** (`#prevention`) — Food safety, rodent control, hand hygiene, healthcare guidelines
- **Emergency Reporting** (`#emergency`) — Supabase-backed symptom report form; NCDC hotlines; treatment centres

## Data coverage

- Nigeria Lassa fever epidemiology: 2020–2026
- 37 Nigerian states with cumulative case/death/recovery data
- West African Lassa fever context (Nigeria, Sierra Leone, Guinea, Liberia, Benin, Ghana)
- NCDC emergency hotline: 0800-9700-0010

## Technical

- Built with React 18, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, Recharts, Supabase
- Supabase Realtime subscriptions on `symptom_reports` table
- JSON-LD structured data: WebSite + MedicalWebPage schemas

## Contact

NCDC Headquarters, Abuja, Nigeria
Email: info@ncdc.gov.ng
Hotline: 0800-9700-0010 (Free, 24/7)
